name_en: Lady Dior quilted matte calfskin flap bag, including the hardware chain handle, features a textured matte finish that is versatile and elegant. Ultra mat finish metal accessories. Can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody.
name_cn:
Lady Dior quilted matte calfskin flap bag, including the hardware chain handle, features a textured matte finish that is versatile and elegant. Ultra mat finish metal accessories. Can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody.
Size: 17cm.
Style No.: 6603
